title: Vibrant Charred Uruguayan Tiger Prawns Skewers
description: A bold, gluten‑free seafood dish featuring tiger prawns marinated in dashi and smoked paprika, then charred on a binchotan grill for a smoky finish.
instructions: Whisk dashi extract, smoked paprika, cumin, salt, pepper, olive oil, lime juice, and garlic in a bowl.
Add the prawns, stir to coat, cover, and refrigerate for 10 minutes.
Preheat a binchotan grill to medium‑high and lightly oil the grates.
Thread each prawn onto a skewer, followed by an onion wedge and a pinch of cilantro, repeating until all are skewered.
Place the skewers on the grill and cook for 3 minutes; flip and cook another 3 minutes until prawns are opaque and onions are charred.
During the last minute of grilling, brush each skewer with leftover marinade to enhance flavor.
Remove the skewers and let them rest for 2 minutes to redistribute juices.
Arrange on a platter, drizzle a touch of lime juice, and sprinkle extra cilantro.
Serve immediately with quinoa or a simple mixed green salad.
Enjoy the smoky, savory flavor of the charred tiger prawns while still warm.
